changelog: 0.6.1  Shared theme (aurora-theme.css) extracted from the demo's design language; home shell restyled to match
0.6.0  Unified app shell — home dashboard + left sidebar nav connecting the live screens, with yellow build/sign-off status indicators
0.5.0  Users & Roles screen — Yard Jockey role on a terminal user, with personalized QR
0.4.0  Yard jockey app (priority moves, Start/Complete) + yard_moves backend
0.3.0  Order entry — lookups, create-on-the-fly, duplicate prevention
0.1.0  Admin onboarding + password gate; multi-tenant API foundation
